title: Alexander the Great becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Alexander III of Macedon, most commonly known as Alexander the Great, was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedon.

title: Philip II of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Philip II of Macedon was the king (basileus) of Macedon from 359 BC until his death in 336 BC.

title: Pyrrhus becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Pyrrhus was a Greek king and statesman of the Hellenistic period.

title: Alexandros IV of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Alexander IV, sometimes called Aegus, was the younger son of Alexander the Great by his wife Roxana of Bactria, born after his father's death.

title: Philip III of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Philip III Arrhidaeus was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedonia from 323 until his execution in 317 BC.

title: Cassander becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Cassander was king of the Ancient Greek kingdom of Macedonia from 305 BC until 297 BC, and de facto ruler of southern Greece from 317 BC until his death.

title: Lysimachus becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Lysimachus was a Thessalian officer and successor of Alexander the Great who became king of Thrace in 306 BC, western Asia Minor in 301 BC and Macedon in 288 BC.

title: Philip V of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Philip V was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedon from 221 to 179 BC.

title: Perseus of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Perseus was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedon from 179 until 168 BC.

title: Antigonus II Gonatas becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Antigonus II Gonatas was a Macedonian Greek ruler who solidified the position of the Antigonid dynasty in Macedon after a long period defined by anarchy and chaos and acquired fame for his victory over the Gauls who had invaded the Balkans.

title: Demetrius I of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Demetrius I Poliorcetes was a Macedonian Greek nobleman and military leader who became king of Asia between 306 and 301 BC, and king of Macedon between 294 and 288 BC.

title: Amyntas III of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Amyntas III was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedonia from 393/2 to 388/7 BC and again from 387/6 to 370 BC.

title: Philip IV of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Philip IV was briefly king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedonia in 297 BC.

title: Alexandros II of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Alexander II was king of the ancient Greek kingdom of Macedon from around 370 BC until his death in 368 BC.

title: Antigonus III Doson becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Antigonus III Doson was king of Antigonid Macedon from 229 BC to 221 BC.

title: Perdiccas III of Macedon becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Perdiccas III was king of the Hellenic kingdom of Macedonia from 365 BC to 360 BC, succeeding his brother Alexander II.

title: Ptolemy Ceraunus becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Ptolemy Ceraunus was a member of the Ptolemaic dynasty and briefly king of Macedon.

title: Demetrius II Aetolicus becomes king of Macedonia
fact: Demetrius II, also known as Demetrius Aetolicus, was king of the Ancient Greek kingdom of Macedonia from 239 until his death in 229 BC.
